creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #5)
> It doesn't [work]. Nothing shows up.
Of course it does, it just needs config and theme files as it says in the log.  I've changed the port so it copies default system-wide ones under ~/.config/gorss to reduce first-time user's confusion.

> It needs infocmp which comes with ncurses but it is not listed as a run
> dependency.
No it doesn't really /need/ it, only as a last resort.  There's probably something wrong with your environment; to start with, what's the value of $TERM?
